form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after -1 days 7th of 16 at Durtal on March 22 over 2900m, 3.5 len behind Mississipi with 65.5kg. Previously second-up 7th of 16 at Durtal on March 22 over 2900m, 3.5 len behind Mississipi with 65.5kg. Rates highly and expected to do much better with that run under her belt.

form.formComment: At the latest run won by a head at Montlucon-Neris March 22 over 3100m defeating Milady Fatal with 62.5kg. The race before that 8th of 14 at Saumur on March 8 over 2700m, 10 len behind Little Lulu carrying 63kg. Fitter again but looks safely held in this company.

form.formComment: Most recently ran last of 11 at Saint-Cloud in G3 on March 24 over 2500m, 11 len behind Louisa Banbou with 64kg at $29. The start before that 2nd of 14 at this track on March 7 over 3200m, slow going neck behind Mystere Du Repas carrying 63.5kg at $11. Can atone.

form.formComment: At debut, 7th of 12 at Montlucon-Neris on March 22 over 3100m, 8 len behind Melchior Kergador carrying 60.5kg. Others look better prospects.

form.formComment: At debut, 3rd of 14 at this track on March 7 over 3200m, slow going 3.5 len behind Mystere Du Repas with 63kg at $22. Open to improvement and expected to go on with it.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign second last of 9 at Lyon-Parilly in G3 on October 30 over 2400m, on heavy track; 40 len behind Mets Ta Ceinture with 60.5kg at $12. First up last campaign 2nd of 11 at Le Lion-d'angers on August 3 over 2400m, 1.5 len behind Mondialito D'huez carrying 62.5kg at $3.10. Can play a major role.

form.formComment: Jumped as a despised roughie at debut, 9th of 11 at Saint-Cloud in G3 on March 24 over 2500m, 7 len behind Louisa Banbou with 62.5kg at $71. Better for that run but may need more time.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last campaign 5th of 8 at Durtal in G3 on December 14 over 2900m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Miss Gibraltar with 62kg. When resuming last campaign 3rd of 8 at Saint Brieuc on October 5 over 2400m, slow going 2.25 len behind Miss Gibraltar carrying 62kg. Must be respected.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after nine months 8th of 14 at this track on March 7 over 3200m, slow going 9 len behind Mystere Du Repas carrying 62kg at $3.40. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Le Lion-d'angers on June 8 over 2400m, on a slow track; long-neck behind Misty Morning with 62.5kg at $2.50. Fitter and rates highly.
